title: Heterotropa stolonifera
intro: Heterotropa stolonifera, also known as Asiatic pennywort, is a type of perennial herb that belongs to the family Piperaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, making it beneficial for immune system support and reducing symptoms of respiratory infections. The bioactive constituents of Heterotropa stolonifera include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation, alleviate stress, and support overall well-being.
taxonomy: Heterotropa stolonifera belongs to the family of flowering plants known as the Gentianaceae. It is a species of flowering plant native to China.
